name: Prophecy of Love
original_name: พยากรณ์ซ่อนรัก
overview: Rosita gets into a car accident and suddenly gets a talent where she sees the future when she touches a rose. She becomes a famous fortune teller. One day, she makes a prediction in public to reporters that Theeruth, a famous actor, will make a woman pregnant and have a secret child. That prediction gets Theeruth into trouble, and their relationship becomes antagonistic from that day.

trailers.title: พยากรณ์ซ่อนรัก เริ่มเร็วๆนี้ ทางช่อง3 กด33 | Ch3Thailand
